title: Uniqlo Evangelion 30 Apparel
wikitext:
[]: Uniqlo Evangelion 3.0 Apparel (?)             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Jan 08, 2013 1:41 pm When my friend and I went to the Uniqlo store in NYC last June, we found a whole table full of t-shirts featuring designs from the first two Rebuild movies. We're going to the city again tomorrow, and one of our planned stops is this same store. Would anyone happen to know if Uniqlo has produced any Q-themed apparel since the movie came out? I'm pretty confident that they haven't made any yet, but I just wanted to be sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 08, 2013 7:15 pm If they have, it's not been advertised on their website. I know there were at least 2 instances that I mentioned them on the twitter feed: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) It was a summer-only campaign so they're not marketing that anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Tue Jan 08, 2013 8:48 pm Yeah, they do. My girlfriend got a grey tee with 'Q' on it (Probably the best out of the lot), and I got a red Unit-2'β shirt for my brother. This was in Japan though mind...

[]:             Quote Post by transcendent12 » Wed Jan 09, 2013 11:05 am yeah, been out for some time in Japan. At least in the UK, it took a while (years?) for the eva 2.0 stuff to arrive. So your best bet for immediate relief is sellers through ebay, to be had around £20+

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI_01 » Wed Jan 09, 2013 7:35 pm I just recently manged to import a 2.0 shirt which I take as being pretty lucky since they have not been in production for awhile now. I too wonder when the 3.0 shirts will finally make their worldwide appearance... or even to be available to import.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Jan 09, 2013 10:54 pm MAGI_01 wrote: I just recently manged to import a 2.0 shirt which I take as being pretty lucky since they have not been in production for awhile now. I too wonder when the 3.0 shirts will finally make their worldwide appearance... or even to be available to import.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI_01 » Thu Jan 10, 2013 12:14 am riffraff11235 wrote: Damn, they stopped making them? I saw them at Uniqlo's flagship store in June, but I didn't think they were going out of print anytime soon.

[]:             Quote Post by spiderman is cool » Thu Jan 10, 2013 7:53 am Had never heard of this store before, just did a quick search and glad to say they have a branch where I live in Japan (Okinawa), I'll have to stop by soon!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Jan 10, 2013 3:15 pm I've been waiting for the Eva shirts to show up on the US website but no luck there, although they do have Ghost in the Shell, Tiger & Bunny, and One Piece. My sister scored for me the blue GiTS shirt of Section 9 from the SF store but her latest report is that they are now out. The SF store opened in the fall so who knows if they would have stocked 3.0 shirts if they had opened earlier. Ebay has some from both 2.0 and 3.0. Just landed a 2.0 shirt of a scene of Rei from 1.0 for $0.15 although it's for collecting purposes since it's size S. A couple of the ebay sellers stock multiple sizes of one design but no guarantees that they will still have one in your size for a good price that isn't too inflated above the 1,500 Y price tag. There is also a HK based website named Kidsamurai that I was hoping would stock 3.0 shirts since they did for 2.0 but they never came in. They are sold out of all earlier shirts but you can use their website as a historical reference .

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI_01 » Thu Jan 10, 2013 3:26 pm AR-99 wrote: There is also a HK based website named Kidsamurai that I was hoping would stock 3.0 shirts since they did for 2.0 but they never came in. They are sold out of all earlier shirts but you can use their website as a historical reference .

[]:             Quote Post by unit01 » Fri Jan 18, 2013 10:45 pm http://www.uniqlo.com/jp/store/feature/uq/ut/evangelion/ might help ?

[]:             Quote Post by BlackberryMilk » Wed Jan 23, 2013 10:05 am unit01 wrote: http://www.uniqlo.com/jp/store/feature/uq/ut/evangelion/ might help ?
